Holovids Holovids refer t0 either feature movies regular broadcast programming Because of tne vast distances and times involved in transmitting holovids across the Inner Sphere each nation and region (and sometimes even each planet) produces its Own programs Vids are imported from other regions however; and result popular programs can often make the rounds the Inner Sphere over the course of months years Holovids can be viewed at public theater or rented or purchased on data chip for home viewing:
Taxl Rlde Taxis can be found in most large cities and can ferry char- acters just about aywhere they want t0 go in that city (at much higher price than standard public transportation}.
Atmospherlc Flight Most characters wIll not M their Own aircralt; or have immediate access t0 someone else and wiII have t0 charter transportation_ Most locations on planet can be reached this way within ten t0 twelve hours,
Cameras Tri vid cameras record either still shots or full-motion audio and video single data chip can store up to two hours of video 0O0 still images The resolution of the still image eignt times better than the full-motion video While tne tri-vid camera IS palm-sized number of attachments are available including NVDs ad telescopic enses (see Optics, 149}.
Suborbltal Flight Suborbita transport lines Die reserved for the most heavi populated planets_ Characters can reach places on the other side of planet about a hour; but these transports will only operate out of specific aerodromes ad spaceports_ Suborbita shuttles are also used ferry    passengers low' orbit stations
Music Just as with holovids each region space nas Its own music fads. Oftentimes group will find fame in remote region with their first release years Or even decades alter was first recorded_ More than once music company has even tried sign one of these groups, only to find that its members were long since dead_ Interstellar concert tours are rare because the expense of JumpShip travel, but Iocal orchestras and pop bands can be found on every major world. The most common form music takes is the ubiquitous musi chip fingernail sized cnip holding up t0 two hours of high quality sound.
DropShlp Fllght DropShips are the only vehicles that can transport pas sengers and/or cargo out of planetary orbit to other places in star System; such as t0 moon jump point .
Inter-System Travel Characters looking to travel different star system will need t0 book passage on DropShip that has similarly booked travel with JumpShip. JumpShips (carrying DropShips travel routes between severa well-inhabited star systems and many DropShips have been modified to serve a5 passenger liners_ Characters on remote planets will have t0 book passage cargo rather than passenger vessel, spending the length of the journey whatever cramped quarters are available: Additionally: transportation into and out of dangerous areas such as planets under attack. can cost double more
Print Media While the print media i5 basically dead_shipping paper across interstellar distances carries astronomical price tag Iives on In virtual iorm: Publishing houses still produce written inedia, only instead of physically printing them they store them on data chips that consumers plug into their note puters Or tri-vid sets Some people still prefer hard copy they can carry around with tnem, however _in which case they must physically   print the selections they want: variety of written materials available_ from fiction and nonfiction books t0 daily and weekly news reports t0 literally millions of magazines catering every interest.
